# Apio — Real-time API Monitoring
# https://apio.one

Apio is a real-time API monitoring platform for engineering teams.
It provides instant visibility into every API call across all microservices — 
tracking uptime, latency, errors, and traffic with a single command installation.

## What Apio does
- Real-time API request monitoring (latency, status codes, error rates)
- Multi-language support: Node.js, Java (Spring Boot), Python (FastAPI/Django), Go
- One-command SDK installation via shell script
- Live WebSocket dashboard with traffic visualizations
- Project and service-level metrics with historical trends
- JWT-secured multi-tenant architecture

## Who it is for
- Backend engineers who need instant API observability
- DevOps teams monitoring microservices in production
- Startups who want Datadog-level insights without Datadog pricing

## How to install (Node.js example)
```bash
curl -sSL https://apio.one/install.sh | bash
```

## Pricing
Free tier available. No credit card required.

## Links
- Website: https://apio.one
- Documentation: https://apio.one/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/soumikk01/Apio-apimonitor
